== Notes for [[Item:Q78527|Q78527]] ==

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Galla_(wife_of_Julius_Constantius)

------------------------------------

Her ancestry is conjectural. David Hughes' reconstruction of this family makes the wife of Vettius Iustus a half-sister of the Emperor Julian, as daughter of Iulius Constantius. Another theory is that she was a daughter of Crispus (by Helena), son of Constantine the Great by his mistress Minervina. Either way, she was a member of the Constantinian dynasty. (Justin Swanstrom, 2/25/11)

------------------------------------

ID: I66362

Name: Galla of Rome

Given Name: Galla

Surname: of Rome

Sex: F

_UID: 4E7F4F7BC41C7040B231D2BB7F1FBD9E90D1

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 315

Death: deceased

Forrás / Source:

Father: Julius of Rome b: ABT 290

Mother: Neratia of Rome

Marriage 1 Vettus Justus of Rome b: ABT 310

Married:

Children

Justina Augusta of Rome b: ABT 339

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I66362

Downloaded from the Bruce Cooley Pusch RootsWeb site. Please remove the symbols I've inserted in many of the names like (L),(P) and(BCP). Also please delete the (NOTES)I've written in some entries in the first person, the notes that refer just to me.

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q126107314 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000003828287378

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
